title: Your Car Insurer Charges 19% More for Loyalty
hook: Your car insurance company's best rates go to strangers — loyal customers like you pay 19% more, and they're counting on your inertia.
angle: The insurance loyalty penalty is counterintuitive: staying loyal to a brand normally feels virtuous, but auto insurers actively charge long-term customers more than new ones.
audience: Anyone who hasn't shopped their auto insurance in the past 2 years — practically everyone.
